BRAZIL-SOUTH COAST.
HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS:
   A. 131700Z TO 131800Z SEP IN AREA BOUND BY
      23-02.03S 043-35.03W, 23-04.03S 043-35.03W,
      23-05.03S 043-47.03W, 23-02.03S 043-47.03W.
   B. 141700Z TO 141800Z SEP IN AREA BOUND BY
      23-02.03S 043-51.03W, 23-02.00S 043-35.03W,
      23-04.03S 043-35.03W, 23-05.03S 043-51.03W.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 141900Z SEP.
